/home/runner/work/Google-Play-API/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gplayver.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gplayver.dir/src/gplayver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gplayver.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gplayver.dir/src/config.cpp.o -o gplayver  libgplayapi.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so
